papers.title: Propensity Score Matching for Impact Evaluation in Developing Countries
papers.description: Examines the application of PSM for evaluating capacity development programs in Ethiopia, with recommendations for addressing selection bias in quasi-experimental settings.

papers.title: Climate Mobility and Household Resilience in the Horn of Africa
papers.description: Investigates the interlinkages between environmental shocks, human mobility patterns, and adaptive capacity in Afar and Somali regions of Ethiopia.

papers.title: Youth Aspirations and Resilience in Post-COVID Ethiopia
papers.description: Analyzes youth employment challenges and adaptive strategies across Ethiopia using nationally representative survey data from a six-country study.
